sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46583" key="h(/bhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἥβ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n46583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pubescence</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">περὶ τὸ ἦτρον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.24</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
